ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "power_tltm_max" REAL /* Maximum transmission power level in dBm */,
  "power_tltm_min" REAL /* Minimum transmission power level in dBm */,
  "power_rltm_max" REAL /* Maximum reception power level in dBm */,
  "power_rltm_min" REAL /* Minimum reception power level in dBm */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band in which the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the measurement in seconds */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES measurement_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site */,
  "site_height" REAL /* Height of the site above ground level */,
  "site_environment" TEXT /* Environment description */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance at the site */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site covered in the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report contents */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time interval covered by the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., power drop, power spike) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the alert */,
  "alert_resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("alert_handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the thresholds apply to */,
  "max_power_tltm" REAL /* Maximum transmission power level threshold */,
  "min_power_tltm" REAL /* Minimum transmission power level threshold */,
  "max_power_rltm" REAL /* Maximum reception power level threshold */,
  "min_power_rltm" REAL /* Minimum reception power level threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold */,
  "threshold_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the threshold is applicable */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the statistics were calculated */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement entry used for statistics */,
  "average_power_tltm" REAL /* Average transmission power level */,
  "average_power_rltm" REAL /* Average reception power level */,
  "max_power_tltm" REAL /* Maximum transmission power level */,
  "max_power_rltm" REAL /* Maximum reception power level */,
  "min_power_tltm" REAL /* Minimum transmission power level */,
  "min_power_rltm" REAL /* Minimum reception power level */,
  "standard_deviation_power_tltm" REAL /* Standard deviation of transmission power levels */,
  "standard_deviation_power_rltm" REAL /* Standard deviation of reception power levels */,
  "median_power_tltm" REAL /* Median transmission power level */,
  "median_power_rltm" REAL /* Median reception power level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_statistics_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_statistics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement device (e.g., spectrum analyzer) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is deployed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last calibrated */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device taking the measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed log information */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES measurement_devices ("device_id")
)
